subject: english
title: Unit 8 Mission App — Enjoy a Hobby
subtitle: Think · Pair · Share — Jørn Hurum & ammonites. 4 modules: Be the Expert, Think, Pair & Share, Final Quiz.

content: Learn about ammonite fossils and paleontologist Jørn Hurum.
Think about hobbies you enjoy and why they matter.
Share ideas about a hobby you would like to try.
Evaluate which hobby is most interesting and explain why.
language: Use the word enjoy to talk about activities you like.
Use sentence frames to share and evaluate ideas.
Describe hobbies using I would like to try and you need.
